mapper.select: select id, session_id, role, content, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from aifc_ai_message where session_id = #{sessionId} order by create_time asc, id asc
mapper.delete: delete m from aifc_ai_message m inner join aifc_ai_session s on s.id = m.session_id where s.create_by = #{createBy}
